description: Curated zero-shot probe subset of Liye Qin bamboo-slip manuscripts used in Sec. 4.7.3 of the paper. Each entry corresponds to one bamboo-slip scan. M is the total number of visible ground-truth characters; K is the number of those characters covered by at least one predicted character box from DL-CV ParamNet under the protocol of Sec. 4.6. K and M are reproduced here so that an independent reader can verify the 99/121 aggregate without opening the character_coverage_liye.xlsx sheet.

criteria: C1: the slip scan is visually complete, with no large physical break that removes a contiguous sequence of character positions.
C2: at least 3 characters are visible to the unaided eye, so that the per-slip coverage rate is not dominated by a single character.

C3: at least one of the substrate-degradation modes targeted by this probe is present: pronounced wood-grain texture, water staining, or thin / partly faded ink. This ensures the probe stresses the model under conditions absent or rare in the DeepJiandu test split.
selection_criteria.explicitly_NOT_a_criterion: Per-slip coverage rate of the predicted boxes. The selection looks only at the manuscript condition, never at the model's output, so the 20-slip aggregate of 81.8% is not biased toward slips on which the model already performs well.

source_note: Slip IDs follow the convention <page>_<slip-on-page> as used in the public Liye Qin scan repository. The exact source URLs are listed in the README.
